originalTitle: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of workers
summary: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of its workers, or around 93 employees, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a memo to employees, Patreon CEO Jack Conte writes that the company isn't making these changes "because we believe AI replaces humans," but says AI has "fundamentally transformed the tech industry, including how we work, […]
content: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of its workers, or around 93 employees, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a memo to employees, Patreon CEO Jack Conte writes that the company isn’t making these changes “because we believe AI replaces humans,” but says AI has “fundamentally transformed the tech industry, including how we work, how we build products, how we communicate, and more.” That shift has changed “how we operate and organize,” Conte writes. During an interview on Decoder, last month, Conte laid out his stance on AI, saying that the company is “100 percent embracing” AI tools internally to continue serving creators: > If Patreon does not fully embrace these tools as a product and engineering company — and we are ultimately a product and engineering company — and use them to give the power back to creators, we, as a company, will be dead in three years. Patreon previously laid off 17 percent of workers in 2022, as well as closed its offices in Dublin and Berlin.
chineseTitle: Patreon 将解雇 20% 的员工
chineseSummary: 据 404 Media 早些时候报道，Patreon 将解雇 20% 的员工，即大约 93 名员工。 Patreon 首席执行官 Jack Conte 在给员工的一份备忘录中写道，公司不会做出这些改变“因为我们相信人工智能会取代人类”，但他表示人工智能“从根本上改变了科技行业，包括我们的工作方式，[…]
chineseContent: 据 404 Media 早些时候报道，Patreon 将解雇 20% 的员工，即大约 93 名员工。 Patreon 首席执行官 Jack Conte 在给员工的一份备忘录中写道，公司之所以做出这些改变，并不是“因为我们相信人工智能会取代人类”，而是表示人工智能“从根本上改变了科技行业，包括我们的工作方式、产品制造方式、沟通方式等等。”孔特写道，这种转变改变了“我们的运作和组织方式”。在上个月接受 Decoder 采访时，Conte 阐述了他对 AI 的立场，表示公司正在内部“100% 拥抱”AI 工具，以继续为创作者提供服务： > 如果 Patreon 作为一家产品和工程公司（而我们最终是一家产品和工程公司）不完全拥抱这些工具，并利用它们将力量交还给创作者，那么作为一家公司，我们将在三年内消亡。 Patreon 此前于 2022 年解雇了 17% 的员工，并关闭了都柏林和柏林的办事处。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
